title: bursera aspleniifolia
intro: Bursera aspleniifolia, also known as Palo de Fierro or Ironwood, is a species of tree native to the tropical forests of Central America and Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bursera aspleniifolia include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Bursera aspleniifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
